data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Efficient navigation is achieved by reducing the number of clickable options, aiding user decision-making processes.
data.technical_spec: Optimized UI pathing, prioritizing frequently used actions.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs interfaces that accommodate quick tap interactions, considering touch target sizes and spacing.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, target size principles, gesture ease.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design elements are consistent with other popular platforms to improve user familiarity and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Cross-platform design uniformity, consistency in UI/UX elements.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is presented in chunks to improve user understanding and retention.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Prioritizes displaying unfinished tasks prominently to motivate completion.
